text: Neither party may assign this Agreement without the prior written consent of the other party, except in connection with a merger, acquisition, or sale of substantially all assets.
Either party may freely assign this Agreement to any third party without notice or consent.
Neither party may delegate its duties or performance under this Agreement without the prior written consent of the other party.
Either party may delegate any or all of its performance obligations under this Agreement to third-party subcontractors without consent.
Any assignment of rights or delegation of duties under this Agreement shall be effected solely by way of a tripartite novation agreement signed by both parties and the assignee.
A party may assign its rights and delegate its duties by giving notice, without need for a formal novation agreement.
A change of control of either party, including by merger, stock sale, or reorganization, shall be deemed a prohibited assignment under this Section.
A change of control, merger, or acquisition of a party shall not constitute an assignment or transfer under this Agreement.
The Supplier hereby assigns by way of charge all of its future receivables to the Lender, operating as an equitable assignment of such future rights.
This Agreement constitutes an absolute assignment under hand in writing, signed by the assignor, of all rights and benefits due to the Client.
